_readme: Copy objects from groups into verified_groups.json. Do not rename this file to verified_groups.json without replacing placeholders and real evidence URLs.

groups.label: Short neutral label supported by your sources
members: INVESTOR LEGAL NAME EXACTLY AS IN one_percent_holders.csv

evidence.title: Document title (e.g. annual report / prospectus / OJK filing)
evidence.notes: Section, table, or excerpt reference tying these members to the label.

INVESTOR LEGAL NAME EXACTLY AS IN one_pe.title: Optional per-member source when group-level citation is insufficient
